Cosine similarity over zero-padded vectors. Non-finite results normalize to 0.

## Import

```ts
import { cosineSimilarity } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

## Signature

```ts
function cosineSimilarity(
	a: readonly number[],
	b: readonly number[],
): number
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |

| `a` | `readonly number[]` | Missing @param a JSDoc. |
| `b` | `readonly number[]` | Missing @param b JSDoc. |
